title: LED Batten Light Under Cabinet Lights with Plug in. Fluorescent Strip Light 3000-6500K Dimming and Color. with Wireless Control Panel and Remote Control.15W for Garage,Closet,Office,Shed (40CM-1PCS)
features: How to control multiple lights through the remote control or control panel: all lights must be turned on at the same time. Then press and hold the ON button for three seconds immediately after the light is on, and the light will flash, proving that the pairing is successful. Now you can control multiple objects.
Bright lights-The power of 15W has a brightness of 1500LM, and it can also be dimmed, and the color temperature can be adjusted from 3000K-6500K.
Multi-functional application-Equipped with a wireless control panel and a remote control, it can control the switch of the lamp, brightness changes and color temperature changes.
Convenient installation-The 6.5-foot open-light plug cable allows you to install and use in multiple scenes, and the double-sided adhesive can quickly install fixed lamps and wireless control panels.
LED Lights – Long-life, energy-efficient LED technology eliminates need for replacement bulbs

Wide Application-Great hardwired under cabinet/counter lights for kitchen, wine cabinets, bookcases, wardrobes, shelves, closet, cupboard, garage, storeroom, pantry, basement, stairs, hallway, etc. Creating a bright environment and increasing the quality of lighting when working in the room.

LED Batten Light Under Cabinet Lights with Plug in Merchant video The length of the plug wire with switch is 6.5 feet. So that you can easily use it in more scenarios. With wireless control panel and remote control. Give you more usage options The wireless control panel needs a CR2032 button battery, and the remote control needs a No. 7 dry battery.Both the control panel and the remote control can control the lamp.It can be dimmed and colored, and the light can be turned on and off. Quick and simple installation Lamps and wireless control panels can be fixed and installed with double-sided adhesive tape, which is very simple and convenient and fast to install. Multi-function control One control panel can control multiple lights at the same time. A remote control can also control multiple lights at the same time. A lamp can only be controlled by a control panel and a remote control at the same time, or can only be controlled by two control panels at the same time. Or it can only be controlled by two remote controls. The wireless control panel needs to be fixed with double-sided adhesive. It can be used in any scenario, which is very simple. Steps to install CR2032 button battery on the control panel
